en: Well, I doubt it since she's been dead for 14 years. Technically, she was never alive.
ja: 14年前に死んでるから関係ないだろう。
zhTW: 我懷疑，因為她已經死了14年了。
vi: Toi nghi ngo, vi co ay da chet 14 nam roi.

en: Rachel was Jennifer Wilson's stillborn daughter 14 years ago.
ja: レイチェルは14年前の死産児だった。
zhTW: 瑞秋是珍妮佛·威爾遜14年前的死產女兒。
vi: Rachel la con gai chet luu cua Jennifer Wilson 14 nam truoc.

en: No, that's... that's not right. Why would she do that? Why?
zhTW: 她為什麼要那樣做？為什麼？
vi: Tai sao co ay lam vay? Tai sao?

en: Why would she think of her daughter in her last moments? Yup, sociopath. I'm seeing it now.
ja: 最期に娘のことを考えた?
zhTW: 她為什麼在最後時刻想到她的女兒？
vi: Tai sao co ay nghi den con gai trong giay phut cuoi cung?

en: She didn't think about her daughter. She scratched her name on the floor with her fingernails.
ja: 爪で名前を床に刻んだ。
zhTW: 她用指甲在地板上刻了她的名字。
vi: Co ay cao ten len san bang mong tay.

en: She was dying. It took effort. It would have hurt.
ko: 그녀는 죽어가고 있었어. 힘이 들었을 거야. 아팠을 거야.
ja: 死にかけてて、努力が必要で、痛かった。
zhTW: 她在瀕死，那需要費力。那一定很痛。
vi: Co ay dang hap hoi, phai rat no luc. Chac han rat dau.

en: You said that the victims all took the poison themselves, that he makes them take it.
ko: 너는 피해자들이 모두 스스로 독을 마셨다고 했지,
ja: 被害者全員が自分で毒を飲んだと言ったね。
zhTW: 你說所有受害者都自己吃了毒藥，
vi: Ban noi tat ca nan nhan deu tu uong thuoc doc,

en: Well, maybe he, I don't know, talks to them? Maybe he used the death of her daughter somehow.
ko: 글쎄, 아마 그가, 잘 모르겠지만, 그들과 대화했을까?
ja: 大昔のことだ。なぜまだ悲しむ?
zhTW: 但那是很久以前的事了。她為什麼還會難過？
vi: Nhung chuyen do lau roi. Sao co ay van buon?

en: But that was ages ago. Why would she still be upset?
ko: 하지만 그건 오래 전 일이야. 왜 아직도 괴로워할까?
ja: よくない?あまりよくない。
vi: Khong tot? Hoi khong tot, vang.

en: Not good? A bit not good, yeah.
ko: 좋지 않아? 조금 좋지 않아, 그래.
vi: Vang, nhung neu ban dang hap hoi,

en: Yeah, but if you were dying, if you'd been murdered in your very last few seconds, what would you say?
ja: 何と言う?神様、生かしてください。
zhTW: 你會說什麼？求求上帝，讓我活下去。
vi: ban se noi gi? Xin Chua, cho con song.

en: Please, God, let me live. Use your imagination. I don't have to.
Yeah, but if you were clever, really clever, Jennifer Wilson running all those lovers, she was clever.
ko: 응, 하지만 만약 네가 똑똑하다면, 정말 똑똑하다면...
